revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-170

The horizontal plane through the focus of the optical apparatus of the light.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig10.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: In lighthouse practice in some countries the term "focal plane" is used with the above meaning, although this is quite a different meaning from that of 2-2-165.

{{IALAFooter}}
